name: PAX FLOW Flat Mouthpieces
summary: PAX FLOW Flat Mouthpieces — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Offer your customers the sleek and practical PAX Flow Flat Mouthpiece 2-Pack, an official accessory designed to enhance the portability and discretion of the PAX Flow Vaporiser. These genuine mouthpieces feature a slim, low-profile design optimised for smooth airflow and effortless cleaning, making them ideal for on-the-go vaping sessions. Official PAX Labs accessory sourced directly from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
